# Foundations

Foundation pages extracted from the DS docs site. One file per accepted+crawled URL; see references/foundation-extraction.md for the per-URL iteration contract.

- [colors](./colors.md) — Pairing rules for foreground/background tokens and dark-mode behavior of the color scale.
- [typography](./typography.md) — Type-scale tokens (h1-h6 + body + caption) and the canonical line-height pairing.
- [spacing-layout](./spacing-layout.md) — Spacing-scale words (`condensed`, `normal`, `spacious`) for `gap` and `padding` props.
